covenant-0001.name: Deus Ex Machina
covenant-0001.acquisitionSource: Clear Interlude - Verboten Covenant: City of Big Smoke

setEffects.descriptionTemplate: Realm Mastery +[Arg1]
Gain 1 Arithmetica in the first turn of each battle, and gain an additional 1 Arithmetica every 4 turns during boss battles.

covenant-0001.lore:
The machine is purity absolute; the divine is supreme.
What descends is no mere thread, but Ariadne herself.

covenant-0002.name: Re-evolution
covenant-0002.acquisitionSource: Purchase from Mythag Shop - D-Jewel Exchange

setEffects.descriptionTemplate: Aliemus Regen Level +[Arg1]
Team Unique: Gain 35 Aliemus at the start of exploration. After using Exalt in this battle, gain 2 Aliemus at turn end. This effect can stack up to 3 times.

covenant-0002.lore: Proliferate, proliferate! Let the souls infused with the blood of the Mother Tree spread across the world.

covenant-0003.name: Scarlet Embrace
covenant-0003.acquisitionSource: Purchase from Mythag Shop - Sediment Exchange

setEffects.descriptionTemplate: Crit. Rate +[Arg1]%
the wielder gains 35 Keyflare when dealing Damage, or 70 Keyflare for Crit. DMG. This effect can trigger up to 3 times per turn.

covenant-0003.lore: The fabled architect of the automatons, who destroyed his creations with his own hands.

covenant-0004.name: Crimson Pulse
covenant-0004.acquisitionSource: Purchase from Mythag Shop - Investigation Exchange

setEffects.descriptionTemplate: Crit. DMG +[Arg1]%
After releasing Posse, the wielder gains 30% Temporary Crit. Rate.

covenant-0004.lore: The fabled architect of the automatons, who nourished his creations with his own blood.

covenant-0005.name: Twisted Twins: Black
covenant-0005.acquisitionSource: Clear Interlude - Verboten Covenant: Town of Madness

setEffects.descriptionTemplate: Crit. Rate +[Arg1]%
At the start of odd turns, add the wielder's "Strike" with {Fleeting} and {Exhaust} to your hand.

covenant-0005.lore: Blood-dark sacrifice. May the Twins bless your body.

covenant-0006.name: Burial Ground's Sighs
covenant-0006.acquisitionSource: Clear Interlude - Verboten Covenant: Distorted Mountains

setEffects.descriptionTemplate: {Death Resistance} +[Arg1]%
At the start of the level, {Death Resistance} +25%. After triggering {Death Resistance}, the wielder gains 50 Aliemus.

covenant-0006.lore:
I spit on your grave.
For you have found a rare peace in death.

covenant-0007.name: Twisted Twins: White
covenant-0007.acquisitionSource: Clear Interlude - Verboten Covenant: Frenzied Wax Museum

setEffects.descriptionTemplate: {Death Resistance} +[Arg1]%
Even-numbered turn starts: Add the wielder's "Defense" with {Fleeting} and {Exhaust} to your hand.

covenant-0007.lore: Mist-white prayers. May the Twins bless your soul.

covenant-0008.name: Cursed Rabbit
covenant-0008.acquisitionSource: Purchase from Mythag Shop - D-Jewel Exchange

setEffects.descriptionTemplate: Realm Mastery +[Arg1]
The wielder's Shield and HP Recovery increase by 12%.

covenant-0008.lore: Everyone will love the fluffy white rabbit, including the lovely Alice.

covenant-0009.name: Paradox
covenant-0009.acquisitionSource: Purchase from Mythag Shop - Sediment Exchange

setEffects.descriptionTemplate: Keyflare Regen Level +[Arg1]
Team Unique: Increases the wielder's Base Aliemus by 20. Increases Crit. Rate, Crit. DMG, Shield, and HP Recovery of the wielder's Command Cards by 20%.

covenant-0009.lore: Inevitable, but accidental. Shackled, but unbound.

covenant-0010.name: Photosynthesis Ritual
covenant-0010.acquisitionSource: Purchase from Mythag Shop - Investigation Exchange

setEffects.descriptionTemplate: DMG Amplification +[Arg1]%
Team Unique: After the wielder's Command Card enters {Ultra Space}, grants {Embryo Fusion} +25~50. The lower the current HP, the higher the {Embryo Fusion} gained.

covenant-0010.lore: Science is spectral analysis; art is photosynthesis.

covenant-0011.name: Returnal Line
covenant-0011.acquisitionSource: Clear Interlude - Verboten Covenant: The Outer Sea

setEffects.descriptionTemplate: Realm Mastery +[Arg1]

Team Unique: At the start of next battle, gain {STR} equal to 12% of the wielder's ATK. If the current Realm is {Aequor}, the effect changes to "At turn start, there is a (50 + 0.25 * team's Realm Mastery)% chance to gain 1 stack of Tentacle Gathering. Multiple stacks can be gained if the probability exceeds 100%, and the chance doubles in Boss Battles."

covenant-0011.lore: Rise once more, O sunken city fated for rebirth. Return to us, @3!

covenant-0012.name: Ring of Chamber 36
covenant-0012.acquisitionSource: Purchase from Mythag Shop - Lightless Exchange

setEffects.descriptionTemplate: Aliemus Regen Level +[Arg1]
Team Unique. Keyflare cap and Posse Keyflare cost +200. Exalt Crit. Rate, Crit. DMG, Shield, and HP Recovery +30%.

covenant-0012.lore: Spin, then forget—this is all of her life.

covenant-0013.name: Life Drain
covenant-0013.acquisitionSource: Clear Interlude - Verboten Covenant: Wall of Desert Sands

setEffects.descriptionTemplate: Keyflare Regen Level +[Arg1]

Team Unique: At the end of the turn, gain Keyflare equal to 200% of the wielder's Keyflare Regen. If the current Realm is {Caro}, the Effect changes to: for every 5 points of Keyflare Regen, {Embryo Fusion} +1.

covenant-0013.lore: The cord binds child to mother, a conduit for the fetus to drain an infinite future.

covenant-0014.name: April Tribute
covenant-0014.acquisitionSource: Clear Interlude - Verboten Covenant: Prime Fissure

setEffects.descriptionTemplate: Crit. DMG +[Arg1]%
Team Unique: At turn start, if the enemies' total HP is above 75%, the wielder's Temporary Crit. Rate and Crit. DMG increase by 35%.

covenant-0014.lore: Laid to rest in the spring of 18@2; the headstones stand as a chorus of silent hymns.

covenant-0015.name: Organic Form
covenant-0015.acquisitionSource: Purchase from Mythag Shop - Rose Scrip Exchange

setEffects.descriptionTemplate: Sigil Yield +[Arg1]%
Team Unique. At the start of exploration, reduce up to 100% {Death Resistance}. For each 1% reduced, increase the wielder's Aliemus by 0.15%.

covenant-0015.lore: Loneliness, love, despair, then death. Such is the fate of Lepidoptera.

covenant-0016.name: Sweet Slug
covenant-0016.acquisitionSource: Purchase from Mythag Shop - Investigation Exchange

setEffects.descriptionTemplate: {Death Resistance} +[Arg1]%
Team Unique. If {Annihilation} is unleashed and the Tentacle Stance is switched within 1 turn, the wielder's Shield, Healing, and Final DMG +25% this turn, with a 3-turn cooldown.

covenant-0016.lore: A lethal sweetness fills the air. Beware—the cloying grip of death is upon you.

covenant-0017.name: Dream of Medicine
covenant-0017.acquisitionSource: Purchase from Mythag Shop - Investigation Exchange

setEffects.descriptionTemplate: DMG Amplification +[Arg1]%

Team Unique: Lose 8 Black Sigils after the battle ends. At the start of the battle, shuffle a Basic Copy of each of the wielder's Basic Command Cards (except for Strike and Defense) into the Draw Pile.

covenant-0017.lore: A thousand years ago, five minutes was equivalent to forty ounces of fine sand.

covenant-0018.name: Feast from Afar
covenant-0018.acquisitionSource: Purchase from Mythag Shop - Lightless Exchange

setEffects.descriptionTemplate: Sigil Yield +[Arg1]%
At the start of the exploration, gain 10 Black Sigils. The wielder's "Defense" Shield Generation +60%.

covenant-0018.lore: Feast amidst the carols; celebrate the ruin of the world we once called home.

covenant-0019.name: Unstained Chronicle
covenant-0019.acquisitionSource: Clear Interlude - Verboten Covenant: Ship of the Dark Sea

setEffects.descriptionTemplate: Keyflare Regen Level +[Arg1]
Team Unique: After using Posse, recover HP equal to 12% of the wielder's CON, increasing with the percentage of lost HP, up to 24% of the wielder's CON.

covenant-0019.lore: A gaze cast from the heart of eternity. Incorruptible, untainted, and absolute.

covenant-0020.name: Steppenwolf
covenant-0020.acquisitionSource: Purchase from Mythag Shop - Rose Scrip Exchange

setEffects.descriptionTemplate: DMG Amplification +[Arg1]%
Wielder's Base DMG dealt +20%, and the {Poison} and {Counter} they deal +10%.

covenant-0020.lore:
Awoo, awoo!
Masked and vengeful, the lone wolf roars and springs for the kill.

covenant-0021.name: Cocoon of the Maiden
covenant-0021.acquisitionSource: Purchase from Mythag Shop - Investigation Exchange

setEffects.descriptionTemplate: Crit. Rate +[Arg1]%
Team Unique. The wielder gains 8% Temporary Crit. DMG for each Tentacle after consuming an {Embryo} for the first time each turn, up to 80%.

covenant-0021.lore: O Great Homunculus, we proffer unto thee a vessel pure and without blemish.
